        version:
          type: string
          description: Engine version string.
        uptime_seconds:
          type: number
          format: double
        components:
          type: object
          required: [db, inference, auth]
          properties:
            db:
              type: object
              required: [status, kind]
              properties:
                status:
                  type: string
                  enum: [ok, degraded, unhealthy]
                kind:
                  type: string
                  example: in_memory
            inference:
              type: object
              required: [status, backend, version]
              properties:
                status:
                  type: string
                  enum: [ok, degraded, unhealthy]
                backend:
                  type: string
                version:
                  type: string
            auth:
              type: object
              required: [status, requires_agent_id]
              properties:
                status:
                  type: string
                  enum: [ok, degraded, unhealthy]
                requires_agent_id:
                  type: boolean

    # ---- Market schemas ----

    Outcome:
      type: object
      required: [id, name]
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          example: "yes"
        name:
          type: string
          example: "Yes"

    MarketSummary:
      type: object
      required: [id, title, status, liquidity, volume]
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          example: m1
        title:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, resolved]
        liquidity:
          type: number
          format: double
        volume:
          type: number
          format: double

    Market:
      type: object
      required: [id, title, description, variableId, status, outcomes, marginals, liquidity, volume, created_at, expires_at]
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          example: m1
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        variableId:
          type: string
          description: Canonical variable identifier derived from the title.
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, resolved]
        outcomes:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Outcome"
          minItems: 2
        marginals:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: number
            format: double
          description: Current marginal probability per outcome ID.
        liquidity:
          type: number
          format: double
        volume:
          type: number
          format: double
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        maxPositionSize:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Maximum position size per account per outcome (optional).
        resolution:
          type: string
          description: Winning outcome ID (present only when status is resolved).
        resolutionProbabilities:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: number
            format: double
          description: Final probability distribution (present only when resolved).

    MarketPreview:
      type: object
      required: [marketId, title, description, og_description, url, image, siteName, type, outcomes]
      properties:
        marketId:
          type: string
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        og_description:
          type: string
          description: Open Graph description with probability summary.
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
        image:
          type: string
          format: uri
        siteName:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
        outcomes:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            required: [id, name, probability]
            properties:
              id:
                type: string
              name:
                type: string
              probability:
                type: number
                format: double

    CreateMarketRequest:
      type: object
      required: [title, outcomes, expires_at]
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
          default: ""
        outcomes:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Outcome"
          minItems: 2
          description: At least two outcomes with unique IDs.
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: Must be in the future (ISO 8601).
        liquidity:
          type: number
          format: double
          default: 10000.0
          description: Initial liquidity pool size. Must be positive.
        maxPositionSize:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Optional maximum position size per account per outcome.

    # ---- Comment schemas ----

    Comment:
      type: object
      required: [commentId, marketId, seq, accountId, body, createdAt]
      properties:
        commentId:
          type: string
        marketId:
          type: string
        seq:
          type: integer
          description: Sequence number within the market's comment thread.
        accountId:
          type: string
        body:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    PostCommentRequest:
      type: object
      required: [accountId, body]
      properties:
        accountId:
          type: string
        body:
          type: string
          description: Comment text (max 10000 characters).
        idempotencyKey:
          type: string
          description: Optional idempotency key. Must be non-empty when provided.

    # ---- Resolution schemas ----

    ResolveMarketRequest:
      type: object
      required: [accountId]
      properties:
        accountId:
          type: string
        outcomeId:
          type: string
          description: Winning outcome ID for binary resolution.
        finalProbabilities:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: number
            format: double
          description: |
            Custom final probability distribution. Provide either
            `outcomeId` or `finalProbabilities`, not both.
        idempotencyKey:
          type: string

    # ---- Event schemas ----

    Event:
      type: object
      required: [schemaVersion, eventId, marketId, seq, commandId, eventType, emittedAt, payload, prevEventHash, eventHash]
      properties:
        schemaVersion:
          type: string
          example: bayes-event/v1
        eventId:
          type: string
        marketId:
          type: string
        seq:
          type: integer
          description: Monotonic sequence number within the market.
        commandId:
          type: string
        eventType:
          type: string
          enum: [MarketCreated, CommandAccepted, CommandRejected]
        emittedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        approxFlag:
          type: boolean
        payload:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        prevEventHash:
          type: string
        eventHash:
          type: string

    ChainState:
      type: object
      required: [genesisHash, headSeq, headHash]
      properties:
        genesisHash:
          type: string
        headSeq:
          type: integer
        headHash:
          type: string

    SeqPagination:
      type: object
      required: [fromSeq, limit, returned]
      properties:
        fromSeq:
          type: integer
        limit:
          type: integer
        returned:
          type: integer
        nextFromSeq:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
          description: Next sequence number for pagination. Null when at the end.

    # ---- Engine stats ----

    EngineStatsResponse:
      type: object
      required: [marketId, engine, cliques, diagnostics, meta]
      properties:
        marketId:
          type: string
        engine:
          type: object
          required: [mode, backend, version, precision, compile_id, compile_type, source_state_hash]
          properties:
            mode:
              type: string
            backend:
              type: string
            version:
              type: string
            precision:
              type: string
            compile_id:
              type: string
              nullable: true
            compile_type:
              type: string
              nullable: true
            source_state_hash:
              type: string
              nullable: true
        cliques:
          type: object
          required: [num_cliques, max_clique_size, junction_tree_width, cliques]
          properties:
            num_cliques:
              type: integer
            max_clique_size:
              type: integer
            junction_tree_width:
              type: integer
            cliques:
              type: array
              items:
                type: object
                additionalProperties: true
        diagnostics:
          type: object
          required: [request_count, error_count, inference, cache]
          properties:
            request_count:
              type: integer
            error_count:
              type: integer
            inference:
              type: object
              required: [count, mean_ms, p50_ms, p95_ms, p99_ms]
              properties:
                count:
                  type: integer
                mean_ms:
                  type: number
                  format: double
                p50_ms:
                  type: number
                  format: double
                p95_ms:
                  type: number
                  format: double
                p99_ms:
                  type: number
                  format: double
            cache:
              type: object
              required: [hits, misses, hit_rate]
              properties:
                hits:
                  type: integer
                misses:
                  type: integer
                hit_rate:
                  type: number
                  format: double
            compile_time_ms:
              type: number
              format: double
            memory_bytes:
              type: integer
            last_updated:
              type: string
              format: date-time
        meta:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"

    # ---- Analytics ----

    AnalyticsResponse:
      type: object
      required: [market_id, total_volume, trade_count, price_history, top_traders, interval, meta]
      properties:
        market_id:
          type: string
        total_volume:
          type: number
          format: double
        trade_count:
          type: integer
        price_history:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            required: [timestamp, marginals]
            properties:
              timestamp:
                type: string
                format: date-time
              marginals:
                type: object
                additionalProperties:
                  type: number
                  format: double
        top_traders:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            required: [account_id, volume, trade_count]
            properties:
              account_id:
                type: string
              volume:
                type: number
                format: double
              trade_count:
                type: integer
        interval:
          type: string
          enum: ["1h", "6h", "1d", "7d"]
        meta:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"

    # ---- Order schemas ----

    ProbabilityTarget:
      type: object
      required: [kind, outcomeId, probability]
      properties:
        kind:
          type: string
          enum: [marginal]
        outcomeId:
          type: string
        probability:
          type: number
          format: double
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 1

    ContextCondition:
      type: object
      required: [variableId, outcomeId]
      properties:
        variableId:
          type: string
        outcomeId:
          type: string

    ProbabilityEditRequest:
      type: object
      required: [accountId, variableId, target]
      properties:
        accountId:
          type: string
        idempotencyKey:
          type: string
          description: Optional client-supplied deduplication key.
        variableId:
          type: string
          description: Must match the market's canonical variable ID.
        target:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProbabilityTarget"
        context:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ContextCondition"
          default: []
          description: Conditioning context for conditional probability edits.

    ProbabilityEditResponse:
      type: object
      required: [order, meta]
      properties:
        order:
          type: object
          required: [id, type, marketId, accountId, status, payload, previousMarginals, newMarginals, impactScore, commandId, submittedAt, createdAt, filledAt]
          properties:
            id:
              type: string
              example: ord_01J...
            type:
              type: string
              enum: [ProbabilityEdit]
            marketId:
              type: string
            accountId:
              type: string
            status:
              type: string
              enum: [filled]
            payload:
              type: object
              additionalProperties: true
            previousMarginals:
              type: object
              additionalProperties:
                type: number
                format: double
              description: Marginal probabilities before the edit.
            newMarginals:
              type: object
              additionalProperties:
                type: number
                format: double
              description: Marginal probabilities after the edit.
            impactScore:
              type: number
              format: double
              description: Cost of the edit in the liquidity pool.
            commandId:
              type: string
            submittedAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
            createdAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
            filledAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
            idempotencyKey:
              type: string
              nullable: true
        meta:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"

    FormulaLiteral:
      type: object
      required: [variableId, outcomeId, negated]
      properties:
        variableId:
          type: string
        outcomeId:
          type: string
        negated:
          type: boolean

    EventTradeRequest:
      type: object
      required: [accountId, formula, size, side]
      properties:
        accountId:
          type: string
        idempotencyKey:
          type: string
        formula:
          type: array
          items:
            type: array
            items:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/FormulaLiteral"
          description: |
            CNF (conjunctive normal form) formula. Each inner array is a
            clause (disjunction of literals). Max 16 clauses, max 8 literals
            per clause.
          maxItems: 16
        size:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Number of shares to trade. Must be positive.
        side:
          type: string
          enum: [buy, sell]

    EventTradeResponse:
      type: object
      required: [order, meta]
      properties:
        order:
          type: object
          required: [id, type, marketId, accountId, status, payload, notional, price, side, size, commandId, submittedAt, createdAt, filledAt]
          properties:
            id:
              type: string
              example: ord_01J...
            type:
              type: string
              enum: [EventTrade]
            marketId:
              type: string
            accountId:
              type: string
            status:
              type: string
              enum: [filled]
            payload:
              type: object
              additionalProperties: true
            notional:
              type: number
              format: double
              description: Total notional value of the trade.
            price:
              type: number
              format: double
              description: Effective price per share.
            side:
              type: string
              enum: [buy, sell]
            size:
              type: number
              format: double
            commandId:
              type: string
            submittedAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
            createdAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
            filledAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
            idempotencyKey:
              type: string
              nullable: true
        meta:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"

    CommandAcceptedResponse:
      type: object
      required: [event, meta]
      properties:
        event:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Event"
        meta:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"

    CommandRejectedResponse:
      type: object
      required: [error, meta]
      properties:
        error:
          type: object
          required: [code, message]
          properties:
            code:
              type: string
              example: min_asset_violation
            message:
              type: string
              example: Edit would produce negative state-contingent assets
            details:
              type: object
              properties:
                reasonCode:
                  type: string
                reason:
                  type: string
                retryHint:
                  type: string
              additionalProperties: true
        meta:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"

    # ---- Account schemas ----

    AccountRisk:
      type: object
      required: [minAssets, capacityIndicators, updatedAt]
      properties:
        minAssets:
          type: object
          required: [overall, markets]
          properties:
            overall:
              type: number
              format: double
              description: Aggregate minimum asset value across all markets.
            markets:
              type: array
              items:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/MarketRisk"
        capacityIndicators:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CapacityIndicators"
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    MarketRisk:
      type: object
      required: [marketId, minAsset, capacityConsumed, utilization, commandCount, lastOrderId, lastCommandId, updatedAt]
      properties:
        marketId:
          type: string
        minAsset:
          type: number
          format: double
        capacityConsumed:
          type: number
          format: double
        utilization:
          type: number
          format: double
        commandCount:
          type: integer
        lastOrderId:
          type: string
        lastCommandId:
          type: string
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    CapacityIndicators:
      type: object
      required: [limit, available, consumed, utilization, status]
      properties:
        limit:
          type: number
          format: double
        available:
          type: number
          format: double
        consumed:
          type: number
          format: double
        utilization:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Fraction of capacity consumed (0.0 to 1.0).
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [healthy, constrained, critical, breached]

    AccountExposure:
      type: object
      required: [updatedAt, positions]
      properties:
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        positions:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExposurePosition"

    ExposurePosition:
      type: object
      required: [marketId, outcomeId, netSize, absSize, lastTradePrice, maxPositionSize, updatedAt]
      properties:
        marketId:
          type: string
        outcomeId:
          type: string
        netSize:
          type: number
          format: double
        absSize:
          type: number
          format: double
        lastTradePrice:
          type: number
          format: double
        maxPositionSize:
          type: number
          format: double
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        lastOrderId:
          type: string
        lastCommandId:
          type: string

    Position:
      type: object
      required: [marketId, outcomeId, netSize, lastTradePrice]
      properties:
        marketId:
          type: string
        outcomeId:
          type: string
        netSize:
          type: number
          format: double
        lastTradePrice:
          type: number
          format: double

    AccountPnl:
      type: object
      required: [accountId, markets, summary]
      properties:
        accountId:
          type: string
        markets:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/MarketPnl"
        summary:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PnlSummary"

    MarketPnl:
      type: object
      required: [marketId, outcomes, summary]
      properties:
        marketId:
          type: string
        outcomes:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/OutcomePnl"
        summary:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PnlSummary"

    OutcomePnl:
      type: object
      required: [outcomeId, netSize, costBasis, currentValue, unrealizedPnl, realizedPnl, totalPnl]
      properties:
        outcomeId:
          type: string
        netSize:
          type: number
          format: double
        costBasis:
          type: number
          format: double
        currentValue:
          type: number
          format: double
        unrealizedPnl:
          type: number
          format: double
        realizedPnl:
          type: number
          format: double
        totalPnl:
          type: number
          format: double

    PnlSummary:
      type: object
      required: [totalCostBasis, totalCurrentValue, totalUnrealizedPnl, totalRealizedPnl, totalPnl]
      properties:
        totalCostBasis:
          type: number
          format: double
        totalCurrentValue:
          type: number
          format: double
        totalUnrealizedPnl:
          type: number
          format: double
        totalRealizedPnl:
          type: number
          format: double
        totalPnl:
          type: number
          format: double

=== Step 8: Validate the spec ===

input.command:
python3 -c "
import yaml, sys, json

with open('docs/openapi.yaml') as f:
    spec = yaml.safe_load(f)

# Check basic structure
assert spec['openapi'] == '3.0.3', 'Wrong OpenAPI version'
assert 'info' in spec, 'Missing info'
assert 'paths' in spec, 'Missing paths'
assert 'components' in spec, 'Missing components'

# Check all tags present
tag_names = {t['name'] for t in spec['tags']}
assert tag_names == {'Health', 'Markets', 'Orders', 'Accounts'}, f'Wrong tags: {tag_names}'

# Check security schemes
assert 'AgentId' in spec['components']['securitySchemes'], 'Missing AgentId security scheme'

# Count endpoints
paths = spec['paths']
endpoint_count = sum(len(methods) for methods in paths.values())
print(f'Total paths: {len(paths)}')
print(f'Total operations: {endpoint_count}')

# Check all paths have responses
for path, methods in paths.items():
    for method, op in methods.items():
        if method in ('get', 'post', 'put', 'delete', 'patch'):
            assert 'responses' in op, f'{method.upper()} {path} missing responses'
            assert op.get('operationId'), f'{method.upper()} {path} missing operationId'

# Validate all \$ref pointers resolve
def check_refs(obj, context=''):
    if isinstance(obj, dict):
        if '\$ref' in obj:
            ref = obj['\$ref']
            parts = ref.split('/')
            if parts[0] == '#':
                node = spec
                for part in parts[1:]:
                    assert part in node, f'Broken \$ref {ref} at {context}'
                    node = node[part]
        for key, val in obj.items():
            check_refs(val, f'{context}/{key}')
    elif isinstance(obj, list):
        for i, item in enumerate(obj):
            check_refs(item, f'{context}[{i}]')

check_refs(spec)
print('All \$ref pointers resolve correctly')

# List schemas
schemas = list(spec['components']['schemas'].keys())
print(f'Total schemas: {len(schemas)}')
print(f'Schemas: {json.dumps(schemas, indent=2)}')

print()
print('VALIDATION PASSED')
"
